---
name: Article Idea
about: Suggest an idea to write an article about in the wiki
title: "[Request]"
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

---

**What category does your article belong to**
The category that your article may relate to (needs to be a category that is already in the wiki).

**Describe the idea in sections**
A clear and concise description of what you imagine the article would be about.

**Add additional detail for the article**
More data or information that you would like to see in the article.
